# Rob Gardening & Maintenance

Rob Gardening & Maintenance is a family-run garden services business based in Sydney's Northern Beaches. Three dedicated crews deliver lawn care, hedge trimming, pre-sale property makeovers, seasonal garden care and ride-on mowing across Northern Beaches, Eastern Suburbs, Greater Sydney, Greater Western Sydney and the Central Coast — for homes, strata, business parks and aged care.

- Business name: Rob Gardening and Maintenance
- Based: Northern Beaches, Sydney, NSW, Australia
- Phone: +61 468 170 318 (Mon–Sat 7am–5pm; AI assistant 24/7)
- Email: info@robgardens.com.au
- Website: https://www.robgardens.com.au/

## Services

- [Lawn Care & Mowing](https://www.robgardens.com.au/#services): Regular lawn mowing, edging and lawn health care for residential and commercial clients.
- [Hedge Trimming & Pruning](https://www.robgardens.com.au/#services): Precision hedge shaping, structural pruning and tidy-ups.
- [Pre-Sale Property Makeovers](https://www.robgardens.com.au/#presales): Complete garden makeovers that maximise street appeal and sale price before listing.
- [Seasonal Garden Care](https://www.robgardens.com.au/#services): Mulching, weeding, planting and end-to-end seasonal maintenance programmes.
- [Green Waste Removal](https://www.robgardens.com.au/#services): Collection and removal of clippings, prunings and garden debris.
- [Hard Surface Cleaning](https://www.robgardens.com.au/#services): Pressure washing of driveways, paths and outdoor hard surfaces.
- [Ride-On Mower Hire](https://www.robgardens.com.au/#services): Ride-on mowing service for large lawns and acreage.

## Service Area

Rob's crews work a Monday-to-Friday schedule across the Greater Sydney area, with a core focus on Sydney's Northern Beaches and Eastern Suburbs. Service area also includes Greater Western Sydney and the Central Coast.

Dedicated suburb pages:

- [Mosman](https://www.robgardens.com.au/gardening/mosman) — Lower North Shore, harbourside, hedge trimming and pre-sale makeovers.
- [Rose Bay](https://www.robgardens.com.au/gardening/rose-bay) — Eastern Suburbs, narrow terraces and waterfront homes, salt-tolerant garden care.
- [Clontarf](https://www.robgardens.com.au/gardening/clontarf) — Northern Beaches, Middle Harbour, bush-reserve boundaries and sloping blocks.
- [Terrey Hills](https://www.robgardens.com.au/gardening/terrey-hills) — Northern Beaches acreage, ride-on mowing and bushfire-zone clearing.

## Contact & Booking

- [Request a free quote](https://www.robgardens.com.au/#contact)
- [Phone: +61 468 170 318](tel:+61468170318)
- [Email: info@robgardens.com.au](mailto:info@robgardens.com.au)
- [Schedule overview](https://www.robgardens.com.au/schedule) — which suburbs the crews are in on any given weekday.

## Key Facts

- Three dedicated crews running a Monday-to-Friday service rotation.
- Fully insured.
- Eco-friendly practices: green waste composted where possible, careful plant selection for local conditions.
- Servicing homes, strata, business parks and aged care facilities.
- AI voice assistant ("Tom") available 24/7 via the website orb for instant answers and bookings.
